message:
feat(selection): gene-aware dN/dS + reverse-frame correctness

- core(selection-pressure): accept optional GeneInfo[]; align codon windows to the active CDS frame/strand (including reverse-complement windows for - strand); skip ambiguous/gapped codons; emit neutral windows for non-coding regions.
- core(virtualizer): fix reverse-frame alignment using totalLength; translate AA cells with reverseComplement(codon) for negative frames; make DNA diffs case-insensitive; treat gene coordinates as [start,end) consistently.
- tests: add coverage for reverse-frame dual-mode AA translation and case-insensitive DNA diffing; add selection-pressure test coverage.
- web + tui selection pressure overlays: pass gene annotations through and improve loading/error handling.
